    show_thread_names=1
    show_program_path=1
    highlight_base_name=1
    highlight_megabytes=1
    detailed_cpu_time=1
    show_cpu_usage=1

def test_tui_multiple_interactions():
        """Test multiple interactions."""
        session = f"test_{random.randint(1000, 9999)}"
        try:
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "new-session", "-d", "-s", session, "-x", "120", "-y", "40", "./executable"], timeout=2)
            time.sleep(0.5)
    
            # Toggle tree
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "t"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.3)
    
            # Navigate
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "Down"], timeout=1)
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "Down"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.2)
    
            # Open help
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "h"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.3)
    
            # Close help
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "Escape"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.2)
    
            # Capture screen
            result = subprocess.run(["tmux", "capture-pane", "-t", session, "-p"], capture_output=True, timeout=1)

def test_tui_navigation():
        """Test navigation keys."""
        session = f"test_{random.randint(1000, 9999)}"
        try:
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "new-session", "-d", "-s", session, "-x", "120", "-y", "40", "./executable"], timeout=2)
            time.sleep(0.5)
    
            # Navigate down
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "Down"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.2)
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "Down"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.2)
    
            # Navigate up
            subprocess.run(["tmux", "send-keys", "-t", session, "Up"], timeout=1)
            time.sleep(0.2)
    
            # Capture screen
            result = subprocess.run(["tmux", "capture-pane", "-t", session, "-p"], capture_output=True, timeout=1)

def test_with_sleeping_process():
        """Test with a sleeping background process."""
        # Create a sleeping process
        proc = subprocess.Popen(["sleep", "10"])
        try:
            result = run("-p", str(proc.pid), "-n", "2")
            assert result.returncode == 0
